title: RalphAdversarialReview
description: Output schema for Codex code review in Ralph Adversarial loop. Mirrors CODE_REVIEW.md rubric.

ac_trace.description: Mapping of each acceptance criterion to code + test + verdict.

ac_id.description: Identifier of the acceptance criterion (e.g., US-42.AC1).

code.description: File:line range implementing the AC (e.g., src/auth.ts:88-104). Null if missing.

test.description: File:line of the test that covers this AC. Null if missing.

findings.description: Discrete, actionable issues introduced by this patch.

priority.description: P0 blocks, P1 current cycle, P2 eventual, P3 nit.

evidence.description: Concrete failure mode on the exact line.

verdict.description: BLOCK if any AC fail/missing or any P0. REQUEST_CHANGES if AC without test or any P1. MERGE otherwise.
